assertions.reason: cargo test confirmed generated resolver-tag Store save/get path succeeds without manual CryptoContext at the API boundary.
multi-model resolver test passed, including wrong-context decrypt failure and correct-context success.
multi-field resolver test passed, showing field-specific ciphertext and wrong-field context decrypt failure.
negative resolver tests passed for both missing mapping and wrong-context decryption failure before plaintext corruption.
save/get roundtrip test passed and raw-row assertions verified secure fields remain encrypted at rest.
list and list_limit test passed with plaintext models returned and encrypted raw storage asserted.
create/create_at test passed with plaintext return values and encrypted-at-rest raw rows.
upsert/upsert_at/update_at test passed with updated plaintext returns and changed ciphertext on secure-field update.
save_many/insert test passed with plaintext batch returns and encrypted raw storage.
insert_ignore/insert_or_replace test passed, preserving expected duplicate semantics with plaintext reads and encrypted storage.
success-path coverage uses only plaintext model types in Store and relation APIs; no explicit Encrypted* usage was needed.
targeted integration suite explicitly covered every approved API in the contract with the same plaintext/encrypted-at-rest contract.

commands.observation: Passed: 1 passed; 0 failed; validates model-tag scoped resolver behavior and wrong-context failure path.
Passed: 1 passed; 0 failed; validates field-tag scoped resolver behavior and wrong-field decrypt failure.
Passed: 1 passed; 0 failed; missing resolver mapping returns ResolverNotFound.
Passed: 1 passed; 0 failed; save/get returned plaintext and raw row assertions confirmed encrypted secure fields.
Passed: 1 passed; 0 failed; generated resolver tags worked without manual CryptoContext at Store call site.
Passed: 1 passed; 0 failed; list/list_limit returned plaintext models and raw rows remained encrypted.
Passed: 1 passed; 0 failed; create/create_at preserved plaintext return surface with encrypted raw rows.
Passed: 1 passed; 0 failed; upsert/upsert_at/update_at returned plaintext updates and secure ciphertext changed.
Passed: 1 passed; 0 failed; save_many/insert returned plaintext rows and encrypted raw storage.
Passed: 1 passed; 0 failed; insert_ignore and insert_or_replace preserved duplicate handling semantics with plaintext reads.
Passed: 1 passed; 0 failed; cross-flow relation API succeeded using plaintext sensitive Store models only.
Passed: 1 passed; 0 failed; confirms secure fields are excluded from fallback lookup metadata supporting plaintext-only contract.
